variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 4135 KIT Air Filter Kit
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SA 4135 KIT Air Filter Kit
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 4135 KIT Air Filter Kit. Easy to install and replace, the SA 4135 KIT is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER KIT, Dimension 1 (D1): 348.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 338.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 135.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 50.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 45.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 34.0 mm
